recent_checkpoint.summary: The live card-types write slice keeps deepening around request-driven write feedback, the live roles-permissions review slice now exposes selected-role publish gating plus richer summary/posture cues, and the reports workspace now has Laravel-backed live-source metrics, rows, activity cues, source coverage, and explicit reporting posture instead of staying fully preview-only.
